title: I Am Building Property That Lasts Beyond Me
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the belief that lasting asset-building is too large a reach
excerpt: A short energy statement from the Day 72 theme of a 12-week money programme. The release names the old belief that significant property ownership is out of reach; the allow names the steady accumulation of assets that outlast you.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 72 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: A short energy statement from the Day 72 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 72 theme: trusting the ability to build legacy properties and assets. The statement names the building as ongoing and real, not aspirational.
I am ready to release every belief that significant property ownership or long-term asset building is too big, too slow, or beyond my reach. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow the steady accumulation of assets that last beyond me and pass something solid forward. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from the Day 72 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
